prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 2.7L Type 911/83 flat-six (MFI mechanical fuel injection) with a 3.2L Type 930/20 crankshaft (74.4mm stroke) and 95mm Mahle forged pistons, paired with a 911 Turbo (930) camshaft grind (280° duration, 10.5mm lift) from Schrick for a 3.4L displacement and ~280 HP at 7,200 RPM with 98 RON fuel. Retain the original Bosch K-Jetronic mechanical injection but upgrade to a custom-mapped ECU emulator (e.g., Megasquirt MS3Pro PNP) for precise fueling and ignition timing (12° BTDC base, 36° total advance).

Forced Induction: Install a Rotrex C38-91 supercharger (8.5psi max boost) with a custom air-to-water intercooler (PWR Racing) and a 3.5" silicone charge pipe system (V-band clamps) routed through the rear decklid. Use a custom billet aluminum intake manifold (TWM Performance) with dual 45mm throttle bodies (Weber IDF) and a 911 GT3 RS (996) fuel rail with Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pumps (2x) and 800cc/min injectors (ID1000).

Drivetrain & Suspension: Swap the stock 915/01 5-speed transaxle for a 930/30 4-speed dogleg gearbox (close-ratio: 2.85, 1.89, 1.34, 1.00) with a 40% limited-slip differential (Weissach LSD). Install a custom 911 RSR-inspired rear subframe with spherical bearings (Rose Joints) and a front strut tower brace (911 GT3 Cup). Suspension: Ohlins TTX40 coilovers (24-way adjustable damping) with 22mm front/24mm rear adjustable sway bars (Tarrett Engineering) and spherical bearing control arms (Elephant Racing). Brakes: 911 GT2 (993) 330mm front/322mm rear rotors with 4-piston calipers (Brembo GT) and Ferodo DS2500 pads, paired with braided stainless steel lines (Goodridge).
estetica: Body: Full carbon fiber widebody conversion using a 911 RSR (1974) replica kit (RWB-style overfenders) from KW Motorsport, with a custom ducktail spoiler (911 Carrera RS 2.7 homologation spec) in carbon fiber (AeroTech). Front bumper: 911 Carrera RS (1973) replica with integrated Hella 90mm fog lights and a custom aluminum splitter (911 GT3 R hybrid). Paint: Original Viper Green (22G) with a satin clear coat (PPG Concept DCU2021) and hand-painted "Carrera RS" script in white (Porsche Classic font).

Wheels: 15x9" front / 15x11" rear magnesium center-lock wheels (BBS RS 012, 911 RSR spec) with 235/60R15 (front) and 275/55R15 (rear) Pirelli P7 Corsa tires. Gold anodized wheel centers with polished rims and custom Porsche crest center caps (911 ST replica).

Interior: Full 911 RSR (1974) replica interior with Recaro SRD bucket seats (Schroth 6-point harnesses), a MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm, suede), and a custom roll cage (T45 steel, 8-point) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360). Dashboard: Original 911 Carrera RS 2.7 gauge cluster (VDO) with a digital boost gauge (Defi BF) and a Stack analog oil pressure/temperature gauge. Shift knob: 911 GT3 RS (996) titanium with a custom leather boot (Nappa).
